mnemonics.title: SYSGEN Info: CMDO
mnemonics.content: Remember 'CMDO' (like a commando) for what SYSGEN needs: C = CPU info (type, cores), M = Memory info (RAM size), D = Device info (disks, NICs, I/O), O = OS Options (scheduler, filesystem, security).

mnemonics.title: Three Approaches: RTM
mnemonics.content: Remember 'RTM' (Read The Manual) for the three SYSGEN approaches: R = Recompile kernel (most efficient), T = Table-driven selection (pre-compiled), M = Modular/LKM (most flexible).
